title: Cleanup post-Decimate: sliver triangles + degenerate residui
when_to_use: Da eseguire DOPO `decimate_to_target` quando analyze_mesh_for_print riporta degenerate_faces > 0 introdotti dal decimate. Triggered da R011.
preconditions: decimate (o altra op che riduce polycount) eseguito di recente

dissolve_threshold_mm.description: Threshold per dissolve_degenerate, in mm. 0.001 = 1µm. Più aggressivo del default Blender perché siamo in pulizia post-decimate.

merge_distance_mm.description: Threshold per remove_doubles, in mm. 0.005 = 5µm, più alto del repair_basic (0.001mm) perché stiamo asciugando un Decimate che può lasciare vertici quasi-coincidenti.

steps.label: Select target and enter edit mode
steps.code:
import bpy
for o in bpy.context.selected_objects:
    o.select_set(False)
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')

steps.label: Dissolve degenerate (zero-area, near-zero edges)
steps.code:
import bpy
# threshold in metres given the Blender unit convention
scale = bpy.context.scene.unit_settings.scale_length
thr = ({dissolve_threshold_mm} * 0.001) / scale
bpy.ops.mesh.dissolve_degenerate(threshold=thr)
print(f'dissolve_degenerate threshold={{thr}}')

steps.label: Merge close vertices (sliver-collapsing)
steps.code:
import bpy
scale = bpy.context.scene.unit_settings.scale_length
thr = ({merge_distance_mm} * 0.001) / scale
bpy.ops.mesh.remove_doubles(threshold=thr)
print(f'remove_doubles threshold={{thr}}')

steps.label: Triangulate (slicer-friendly, also catches residual n-gons from dissolve)

verification.notes: After this playbook degenerate_faces should be 0. If non_manifold_edges increased, decimate introduced topology breakage too severe for sliver-cleanup; escalate to Voxel Remesh (R007) or rerun repair_aggressive (R005).
